heroHeadline: Philippines-China Oil Talks Begin as AUKUS $1B UK Submarine Deal Signals Sustained Indo-Pacific Commitment
heroSubtitle: BCM/FMC diplomatic breakthrough at Quanzhou (March 27-28) opens energy cooperation dialogue while PLAN warship incidents near Pag-asa and China's Antelope Reef expansion keep military pressure elevated; Code of Conduct agreement deemed '100% not achievable' in 2026
footerNote: Data sourced from CSIS AMTI, Philippine DFA/AFP/PCG, US Dept. of Defense, USNI News, Reuters, AP, South China Morning Post
